task_completion.description: A fiducial marker is placed on the tumor centroid in the medical imaging software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible fiducial point (e.g., a colored dot or crosshair) is placed within the hyperintense (bright) glioma region on the brain FLAIR MRI in the application's 2D or 3D view.

task_completion.description: An axial view screenshot of the lesion is saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'lesion_axial.png' is visible in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/LocalizationReport/' directory, or an image viewer shows an axial brain slice.

task_completion.description: A coronal view screenshot of the lesion is saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'lesion_coronal.png' is visible in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/LocalizationReport/' directory, or an image viewer shows a coronal brain slice.

task_completion.description: A sagittal view screenshot of the lesion is saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'lesion_sagittal.png' is visible in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/LocalizationReport/' directory, or an image viewer shows a sagittal brain slice.

task_completion.description: The fiducial marker coordinates are saved as a JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'lesion_centroid.mrk.json' is visible in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/LocalizationReport/' directory.

task_completion.description: The localization report is created with the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'localization_report.json' is visible in the target directory. If opened in a text editor or terminal, it contains the fields 'lesion_centroid_ras', 'laterality', 'midline_distance_mm', and 'hemisphere_involvement'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the medical imaging software GUI to place the fiducial and capture screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using a medical imaging application (like 3D Slicer) rather than just running terminal commands to generate dummy files.

integrity.description: The saved screenshots contain actual MRI data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image files ('lesion_axial.png', etc.) display genuine brain MRI scans with a fiducial marker, not blank images, random noise, or unrelated pictures.

integrity.description: The JSON report values appear to be derived from actual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen extracting coordinates or measuring distances in the software, rather than typing completely arbitrary or hardcoded numbers into a text editor without looking at the scan.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: Kaggle dschettler8845/brats-2021-task1. The task requires localizing the glioma centroid with a maximum error of 15.0 mm and a midline distance tolerance of 10.0 mm. Verify that the fiducial is placed visually within the main tumor mass (the hyperintense/bright region on the FLAIR MRI) and that the saved JSON report contains the required fields.
